org.springframework.data.redis.core.SetSpec

Packages that use SetSpec
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.

  • Uses of SetSpec in org.springframework.data.redis.core

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.core that return SetSpec
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.always()
    Set the key unconditionally.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.ComparisonSpec.digest(String hex16)
    Configure digest comparison for conditional set operations.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.expiration(Expiration expiration)
    Set the key with the given expiration.
    default SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.expire(Duration timeout)
    Set the key to expire after the given duration.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.ifAbsent()
    Set the key if it does not exist.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.ifPresent()
    Set the key if it exists.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.keepTtl()
    Retain the existing TTL associated with the key.
    SetSpec<K,V>
    SetSpec.ComparisonSpec.value(V value)
    Configure value comparison for conditional set operations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Boolean
    BoundValueOperations.set(@NonNull V value, @NonNull Consumer<SetSpec<@NonNull K, @NonNull V>> setConsumer)
    Set value for the bound key and customize the operation through SetSpec.
    Mono<Boolean>

    Set value for key and customize the operation through SetSpec.

    Set value for key and customize the operation through SetSpec.
